data.name: Hentai Dates
data.detailed_description:
Your life changes completely the day the [Sex Goddess] herself appears before you to tell you that you’ve been chosen to save the world from the imbalance caused by a spell called [Quick Crush] Far from worrying, this makes you think: “Would this spell work on the Goddess too?” Of course, it would. So, after having intense sex with the Goddess, you rush to the streets to experience all the new possibilities your new magical powers offer you, meeting along the way a wide variety of incredibly attractive girls eager to make your adventure even more exciting and pleasurable.

♥ [Rachel] is the furniture store clerk. She is a flirtatious and cheerful girl, very proud of her legs, and she proves it by striking suggestive poses on the store chairs when no one is looking.

♥ [Lenay] works at an electronics store. She is a very kind and slightly shy girl who just started working there, so she often seems quite nervous. It was a big surprise to discover that when she has your penis in her mouth, she turns into an expert at pleasing you.

♥ [Carla] is a full-grown woman with an enormous ass. You meet her in the supermarket and notice her when she bends down to pick something up from the floor, as her ass is the only thing you can focus on. She is a bit absent-minded and sleepy-looking, but everything changes when she takes you to the alley behind the supermarket and asks you to use her body to satisfy your desires.

♥ [Helen] is the most unpleasant girl you have ever met, but that only makes you want to have sex with her even more. You meet her in a café, where she vents to you about her boyfriend cheating on her. Her plan is to get revenge by sleeping with the first man she finds, and it looks like you are the lucky one.

♥ [Kate] is the girl who works at the pharmacy. She has no shame in talking to you, and when you tell her that your body feels exhausted from all the physical activity today, she gives you medicine to recover your energy. But you didn’t expect that she would be the one to test the medicine’s effectiveness with her own body.

♥ [Jane] is a bad girl who assaults you in the street. She threatens you with a knife to take everything you have, but in the end, she is the one who ends up taking off her clothes.

♥ [Sharon] is a police officer. By mistake, you ended up touching her breasts, and she tried to enforce the law on her own terms, but in the end, you were the one who got a good grip on a fine pair of laws.

♥ [Megumi] is a slightly nervous girl you meet in a hotel. She is a bit shy and reserved, but she tells you that the friend she was supposed to stay with never showed up, making it a great opportunity for you to help warm the bed for this timid girl with glasses.

♥ [Camila] is the hotel cleaner in charge of tidying up your room. She asks if there is anything else she can do for you, and you indirectly suggest that there is a part of your body she could help clean… with her mouth.

♥ [Lana] is the [Sex Goddess]. At first, she asks for your help to save the world, but it seems like she is willing to turn a blind eye if you are convincing enough.

FEATURES

  • Visual Novel++ Format: Each girl has different story arcs that complete her own narrative.

  • No Censorship!: We've removed censorship from the images (we’ll add an option later to censor them as preferred).

  • New Mechanics: Swap image blocks to restore the full picture.

  • Flashback: rewind the story at any time between puzzles. Save and load whenever you want to quickly return to another point in the game.

  • Smooth Navigation: Choose whether text progresses automatically or skip it to reach your favorite part.

  • Immersive Audio: Including music, sound effects, voices, and "other effects." Adjust volume settings independently or mute everything.

PLEASE NOTE

  • All characters depicted and visually represented in this game are over 18 years old, and no real or identifiable minors were used in the production of this game.

  • Help us out! If you think you can improve the narrative in your language, feel free to send us your suggestions via email or message us on our Steam page.

  • We're still working on it: All updates and improvements we develop will be added to the game at no additional cost.

data.short_description: The world is in danger. Humans have discovered an ancient magic called Quick Crush, a spell that makes any girl targeted want to screw your brains out. The Sex Godess has chosen YOU to stop the abuse of this foul magic, what she doesn't know is that you have no intention of stopping anyone...
data.supported_languages: 英文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 簡體中文, 韓文, 日文, 俄文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: WIN XP/Vista/7/8/10/11
  • 處理器: 2 GHz
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 Compatible Graphics Card
